class.name: OggVorbisFormatLoader
class.brief_description: Resource loader for runtime [code].ogg[/code] audio files.
class.description: [OggVorbisFormatLoader] integrates [code].ogg[/code] files with Godot's resource loading pipeline for runtime asset paths used by libmaszyna. It recognizes the [code]ogg[/code] extension and returns an [AudioStreamOggVorbis] resource loaded from the requested file.
